name: My French Onion Soup- Bon Appetit
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Broil the bread until golden, about 1 minute per side.
3. Melt butter in a heavy large saucepan over low heat. Add onions and cook for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add broth and the next four ingredients (bay leaf, pepper, dried thyme, and port). Increase heat and bring to boil.
5. Reduce heat. Stir in the port. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes. The soup can be prepared up to one day ahead. Cover the soup and refrigerate. Bring to a simmer before continuing with the next steps.
6. Preheat the broiler again.
7. Place bread into four ovenproof bowls; put the bowls into a baking dish. Ladle soup into the bowls.
8. Sprinkle with Swiss cheese. Top with Parmesan. Broil until the cheese melts and turns golden, about 1 minute.
9. Serve hot.
